name: Tevogen Bio Holdings Inc.
summary: PART I . Overview We are a clinical-stage specialty immunotherapy company harnessing one of natures most powerful immunological weapons, CD8+ cytotoxic T lymphocytes (CTLs), to develop off-the-shelf, precision T cell therapies for the treatment of infectious diseases, cancers, and other disorders, with the aim of addressing the significant unmet needs of large patient populations.
